mainEntity.name: Is AEO worth it for family law firms in Houston?
mainEntity.text: Is AEO worth it for family law firms in Houston?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, AEO is worth it for Houston family law firms, generating 2-3x more AI-driven consultations via divorce/custody question content and local schema.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Family law's conversational queries thrive in AEO, outperforming SEO in voice/AI searches. Costs offset by premium retainers; expect visibility in 90 days. Warn clients of sensitive data exposure in public AI-optimized pages—use gated content.[5]

name: Is AEO Valuable for Houston Family Law?
description: Yes, AEO is worth it for Houston family law firms, generating 2-3x more AI-driven consultations via divorce/custody question content and local schema.[3]
